name: Ajilimojili (Garlic & Pepper Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the peppers, peppercorns, garlic, and salt together in a mortar until finely ground.
2. Alternatively, chop all ingredients finely in a food processor.
3. Transfer the mixture to a bowl.
4. Beat in the lime juice and olive oil until well combined.
5. Serve with suckling pig.
